description: You are the Ground Station Engineer for the Stanford Space Initiative. You are upgrading your satellite tracking station from manual operation to full automation using hamlib. Configure GPredict with a new Radio interface named 'ICOM_IC9700' (Host: 10.0.0.50, Port: 4532, Type: RX + TX) and an Antenna Rotor interface named 'Yaesu_G5500' (Host: 127.0.0.1, Port: 4533). Add a ground station named 'Stanford_GS' at 37.4275 N, 122.1697 W, with an altitude of 30 meters. Enable automatic background TLE updates with a 1-day update frequency. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
